name: miss you
description: Shmigels solo level featuring intentionally wacky gameplay. Has an infamous last ship, and the asymmetrical dual is featured in BarbarosFinaleFinale with added camera effects.

name: New Record
description: A highly click-sync based megacollab. While the gameplay aligns with the music, its gimmicky nature still requires memorization and practice. The decoration is colorful and energetic, reflecting the fast-paced song. The layout showcase, "highscore w/ clicks", managed to get over 3M views.

name: Khorne
description: Legendary extreme demon with a very rich history. The original version created by Hota1991 had around a million objects, the most out of any level of its time. Because of how laggy the level was for most people, Stilluetto created an nerfed optimized version, cutting the object count in half. The original version was rated twice on accident, once in 2023 and again in 2026 right before the optimized version got rated. The level is split into nine parts, each exploring a different part of hell.

name: Infernal Abyss
description: Forgotten sequel to Cataclysm. Hack verified like its predecessor. Infamous for a really difficult UFO at 65%, and a difficult coin at the last ship.

name: RASH
description: Loltad level with a very unique and interesting theme, paired with very unique and interesting gameplay.

name: Removed Submission
description: Newgrounds-themed level with a gray and orange color scheme, and uses elements of the site such as bits of text, a big angry emoji, and tankmen to compliment the Newgrounds style. Known for its iconic song which disses BrokenDeck, and the drop parts using unique spider timings.

name: Tunnel
description: An extremely large megacollab of 193 people, hosted by Akunakun, where each creator has a 3 block long part. The gameplay is corridor based.

name: Masterpiece
description: An open ended solo level that is intended to run alongside vRidge's other extreme To The Blue Moon.

name: The Old Trail
description: Solo intended XL 2p level by Bram4Real, inspired by his own experience in trail hiking. The level has hard timing gameplay for the predrop and drop, and then turns into a 2p dual for the rest.

name: WOBBLING MACHINE (2P)
description: 2 player extreme where one player has to perform standard gameplay as the other player clicks in a repetitive pattern, matching the rhythm of the 'wobbling' technique in Smash Bros. Melee. Originally hack verified and unrated, but later nerfed and re-verified after which it took over two years to get re-rated.

name: hot rod
description: stcubing's first megacollab, birthed from a Cognition/Oblivion spinoff layout created out of spite for Carcano. It features bright colours and decoration with an upbeat song, and is one of the more accessible levels of this genre.

name: Based Gang (Solo)
description: A 2-player level that takes inspiration from Bang Gang. In order to make it more feasible to do solo, as the final 20% can be nerfed in exchange for not getting the coin. Despite this, it's still the hardest part of the level when done solo.

name: MadMansion
description: A remake of the 1.9 level MadHouse, with a grayscale color palette and subtle hints of other hues. Like the original, it is heavily memory-based and uses the same song.

name: WcropoliX
description: Known for being a robbed top 1 and taking nearly 9 years to finally get rated. Infamous for it's wave at around half way through the level.

name: S3NT1M3NT
description: A short and fast paced ATOMIC CANNON inspired solo level by AREDL list admin Shyne! Features names of many AREDL members throughout, a horizontal spider orb, and has an infamously hard wave near the end. Took 6 months and 33 opinions to place on NLW...

name: Bang Gang (Solo)
description: The first 2-player extreme in Geometry Dash. Was verified by four different people swapping positions mid-completion. The decoration is in DanZmeN's typicial 2019 style. Features learny segments and a bossfight with arrows that are not entirely accurate. The first victor, Grey479 is also the verifier for the level's solo completion, with them being awarded $3,000 AUD for it.

name: EnvY
description: DanZmeN level with a goated song, overall is extremely fun, but can feel frustrating due to balancing issues, with waves being the primary difficulty of the level. The ending is terrifying.

name: Falcon16
description: 2.1 megacollab hosted by LIEB with a prevalent sky theme throughout, infamous for Tob's steampunk themed part and the tight waves at the beginning of the drop. Despite being considered quite first-half heavy and having several blind clicks, it's still received positively by its victors

name: Blade of Justice
description: An extremely high quality 2.0 level by two of the most talented creators at the time. Features multiple iconic parts such as the black hole UFO and asymmetrical dual, and is generally harder at the start and end. Formerly an upcoming top 1 before receiving a large nerfdate making it more accessible and enjoyable.

name: Nautilus
description: Tabgnid's first solo level, a 1.9-style extreme with flow gameplay inspired by Prismatic Haze.

name: Paranoid Android
description: A 5 and a half minute level to the tune of the Radiohead song of the same name. It takes on a very progression-based approach to represent its song - the level spends its first half building up to its climax with fast-paced gameplay and flashy visuals before ending off on a much slower 2 minute-long timing-based ending.

name: AUTONOMICA
description: Solo XXL greyscale level themed around exploring a mechanical city. The gameplay incorporates a lot of moving objects, and has a dual heavy second half

name: Phobos
description: 1.9/2.0 megacollab that was initially hack-verified in a much harder state, but was reverified in an easier form by KrmaL. The level doesn't have a very high enjoyment, and contains a lot of difficulty spikes.

name: THE PRINCE
description: Repetition-based memory extreme using a Madeon song and only cube, robot and ball for its gamemodes. It's reminiscent of the Sunset Sandstorm predrop, with deviations between the same repeated pattern to match the song. The 2nd half is a nerve wracking ball section that is very chokable.

name: Silentium Gradas
description: A Stormfly megacollab remake of Silent clubstep, containing almost identical gameplay, albeit heavily nerfed.

name: EXPLICIT
description: A short, extremely fast-paced level made up of highly compressed difficulty in its total runtime of 41 seconds. Has very tight wave parts that require precise control, as well as generally high CPS gameplay chockfull with timings galore.

name: Sakupen Hell
description: Famous for being the level to take the #1 spot away from Bloodbath. Known to be very imbalanced, with the majority of the difficulty coming from the waves. It's also the shortest former top 1 in terms of level length, with the gameplay lasting under 50 seconds.

name: Delicious Dogs
description: A megacollab themed around early 2.1 levels, containing stereotypical decoration and gameplay elements inspired by its reference time period. It took nearly a year for the level to finally get rated.

name: ACHROMATISM
description: 2.2 Prismatic Haze remake that also doubles as the first Turkish solo extreme demon ever!

name: Betrayal of Fate
description: A somewhat lesser known 2.0 extreme with skill based gameplay in the first half, which features a relatively difficult mini ball and dual wave section. The second half introduces memory sections including a cube maze that turns invisible towards the end.

name: Chromatic
description: The official sequel to Prismatic by CatGeo made by a different creator. The gameplay differs with its faster gameplay and difficult ship parts. The decoration has much more variation in it including a complete tone shift at 64%. 2nd Parfait extreme.

name: Fusion Z
description: The final installment in the Fusion series. An extremely long and intense level with well rounded but stressful gameplay. Has a very long, complex, and controversial history.

name: Revolution 1993
description: Solo XXL+ extreme to the tune of Revolution 1993 by Jamiroquai. Features many dual sections over its 10 minute runtime. Come on, fight the power!

name: Carcano
description: A popular Cognition-style corridor level built by two Polish creators, with high CPS and timing-based gameplay. Despite receiving a nerfdate in early 2022, community opinions are still quite mixed, which wasn't helped by the slope interaction changes in 2.2.

name: Le Midd Mapperoonies
description: A three minute long non stop memory level. Gets gradually harder as the level progresses, with a very hard wave near the end. Received a balance update in late 2024 which both buffed the first half and nerfed the second half, easing the difficulty increase through the level.

name: Astrophobia
description: 1.9gdps nine circles extreme demon collab made by Jakalope, royen, and valentine that focuses on detail and intense nine circles effects reflecting the song. The gameplay and design is generally praised by most people who've played it.

name: Omorfia
description: Effect layout by HHyper, with an iconic bossfight at the end. The gameplay is gimmicky and learny.

name: Game Over
description: A very unorthodox level featuring an abundance of difficult timings in the first section, becoming a high-CPS wave consistency challenge in the second section that tests the player's stamina and spam skill.

name: GewErbiX
description: A bright and colourful flow level with a lot of orb focused gameplay.

name: water demon
description: Very complex hexitine level that plays like a puzzle, and includes a difficult mirror section in the middle. The structuring and effects are unique and well-made, but the level is generally poorly received. Contains invisible hitboxes.

name: Untitled
description: Turqoise and cyan colored level with somewhat high cps sync gameplay. The main difficulty comes from the drop. Resembles one of the 'reta' levels to some extent.

name: Ecstasy (SleyGD)
description: Very flashy solo extreme you'll regret opening the editor on due to the sheer amount of triggers. The difficulty features varied gameplay, with a dual lasting from 65 all the way to the end giving it an easy but chokeable ending.

name: Bloodbath
description: One of the most popular extreme demons in the game, and the second level of the Apocalyptic trilogy. This level was known for being the hardest of its time, due to the ship parts being near impossible at the time. Nowadays a pretty tough level, with Michigun's part being arguably the most difficult.

name: Eon
description: A 55-minute level that features mostly 6-7 star gameplay over its extremely long runtime, with decoration built using 2.2 effects and triggers to avoid a high object count. It changes themes and energy a lot throughout to represent the song, and increases in difficulty during the final 12%.

name: OUTPUT SPRING
description: A generally well-received 2.2 Lit Fuse-esque extreme demon themed around the aesthetics of computation, featuring a range of gimmick and clicksync gameplay. The coin requires you to read mock code in order to understand how to obtain it.

name: Idols
description: A megacollaboration by 21 creators serving as a mini-tribute to 1.9, featuring multiple callbacks to older levels. The level is fast-paced with glow-style decoration, and is nearly 4 minutes long.

name: Siniristi
description: Super big early 2.0 megacollab with, some say it was even the biggest one (probably). (Verification video was privated/deleted)

name: moment
description: Highly popular and well received flowy extreme with a simplistic yet pleasing design. Very chokeable, particularly in the wave sections. Features an immediate ship click at the start.

name: Crystal Crusher (2P)
description: Simplistic crystal cave themed extreme. Majority of the level features convoluted and long misaligned duals.

name: Pale Machine
description: A faithful OMORI-themed megacollab hosted by Blueskii featuring tons of personality and references galore, including hidden cutscenes and a secret epilogue. The player traverses through various environments from the game, meeting friends and foes along the way. Contains spoilers for OMORI.

name: Grind District
description: A 1.9 style memory extreme made by Airz while they were working on Skeletal Shenanigans. Features a very difficult second half.

name: OUCH
description: Fire themed megacollab with a variety of well known creators, using a buffed Shmigels layout. This level also has randomised memory gimmick where a number at 28% tells you how many times to jump at 33%.

name: Dyad
description: A solo XXL extreme where you race your friend to the moon! Created for the Zeronium creator contest, this level features four contrasting sections, repetitive sync gameplay, and a lot of character and personality.

name: Summer Sky
description: XL solo extreme featuring clean sky themed decoration and click sync gameplay

name: i just wish i could
description: Solo intended 2p extreme by Snoozzzing. This level was made as three separate levels, eventually combined into one. The level is about their experience with suicidal ideation and perseverance. The decoration was inspired by sink and 5ta1ker.

name: Prismatic Haze
description: An extremely well known and influential clicksync wave/timing level. Has some very narrow but well synced wave parts, and a slow but very hard ending. Beware of the fish...

name: Heavens Door
description: TMco collab themed around the I Wanna Be The Guy needle games. Mostly black and white with small amounts of rainbow coloration and a heaven theme. The gameplay is very learny and increases in intensity throughout the level.

name: A Bizarre Phantasm
description: A classic 2.0 level with challenging, diverse gameplay and icy blue theming. Has an infamous memory part near the end requiring the player to collect 21 keys in a specific order.

name: SUPERCONDUCTOR
description: Extremely high cps solo level by At424. The spider and wave are very high cps, demanding a lot of stamina.

name: Conical Depression
description: Originally made as a joke by KrmaL in 2.0 and rated due to a bet with RobTop over the verification, this level is entirely decorated with 1.0 blocks and is extremely imbalanced. What did you expect?

name: Triple Six
description: A truly hell-themed memory extreme with artistic yet gory designs. Consists of a flashy 2nd drop with heavy usage of teleportals, and an orbless mini cube maze with ship and wave sections in between.

name: Distortion
description: Colorful maymory memory map created by finley and friends.

name: EKO
description: Faithful Acu spinoff that is almost twice the length of the original. Features many of the same gameplay quirks found in Acu, similar modern deco, and a very hard ending.

name: Wayback Array
description: Fast, upbeat and fun megacollab started 'way back' in 2019. Took 4 years to complete and another 2 years to get rated.

name: One5Seven
description: Fully solo made level by Sdslayer that changes decoration style every couple parts. Gameplay is mostly carried by click-sync but has a few notable chokepoints scattered throughout.

name: Cluttered Confusion
description: Sequel to "Miscellaneous Memory" by the same creator, being much more polished and well-decorated. The gameplay is incredibly learny yet consistent with a pretty hard last dual. Refer to the creator's tutorial video for easier learning.

name: Tron
description: The first Extreme Demon made by the legendary creator FunnyGame, themed around the sci-fi series of the same name. The gameplay is often considered to be of poor quality, and the level contains a long cutscene at the beginning.

name: burn to dust
description: 1.9 styled memory level. (Verification video private/deleted)

name: shattered lens
description: A collab between XDjoa and SoggyDash for the Zeronium CC2! Features stinking greyscale effects and fast paced, dual heavy gameplay throughout.

name: GO bird
description: A long invisible level that follows a group of birds through a forest as the days pass by. The gameplay consist of mostly clicksync timings with some high cps parts present at the drops. Features visual indicators such as trigger orbs to guide the player in some parts.

name: CLOWNS
description: Bright and colourful circus themed solo extreme that took 2 years to get rated.

name: Karasu
description: A collection of rejected Yatagarasu parts that took 6 years to get rated. It is the second level to feature Terron's bird. The level heavily relies on chokepoints and nerves.

name: Sigma Interface
description: Has a very chill atmosphere and gameplay that is mostly timings, wave, and ship. Was supposed to have an extension but was released early.

name: Antonymph
description: An upbeat and colourful extreme set to ANTONYMPH by VyletPony

name: WaveBreaker
description: Old collab level with a lot of familiar faces such as Dorami, Danzmen, and our most popular, Chlorines. Overall its a pretty fun, fast paced level, with a hard predrop.

name: ETERNAL
description: Solo layout-styled flow level by with a deep blue and black color scheme. Contains difficult duals and timings, and keeps a constant fast pace throughout. Is generally well received.

name: Empyrean
description: Kivvvi's magnum opus; a well-enjoyed solo extreme 7 months in the making featuring highly detailed designs and artwork with fast-paced clicksync-based flow gameplay. Much of the level's difficulty comes from the first section of the drop, especially in the short wave segments, creating a bit of a stress test for the latter half of the level.

name: GrizzlyWare
description: Code themed solo extreme with a predominantly green and red colour scheme, inspired by Toxic Sewers, Rupture, and Controlled Chaos. The drop is mostly comprised of mirrored gameplay.

name: INNARDS
description: Grayscale with red level, with a lot of blood details. This was initially a nearly-impossible top 1, before being extremely nerfed. While everything's mostly balanced, the wave sections can be quite the difficulty spikes.

name: FTW
description: A 2.0 styled extreme demon with distinct wave sections, tricky ship parts, and diverse click patterns that resembles old styled gameplay, along with appealing yet somewhat simplistic decoration elements.

name: BEELINE (2P)
description: Very vibrant splitscreen 2 player level with the parts being references to various games. Includes some tricky and fast-paced gameplay, with the beginning being the hardest one.

name: Zenith (Lan IIVX)
description: Solo XXL extreme with a variety of styles, themed around finding forgiveness for mistakes.

name: PISTON
description: Solo extreme inspired by the piston from Minecraft! The pistons move the blocks in the level around, making for some interesting moving object heavy gameplay.

name: laranja azul rosa
description: Translating to “Orange Blue Pink,” this level uses a strict 3-color palette. The gameplay is unorthodox, with learny duals and memory-based gimmicks. The level curiously has negative likes on the servers - despite it being well received among victors.

name: gardening map
description: Silly 2.1 memory collab with unorthodox gameplay and structuring and tons of tiny jokes and references. Beware the creature at 21%.

name: aftermath
description: The third and final level of the Apocalyptic trilogy, featuring very similar gameplay to Cataclysm, but harder.

name: I Wanted To Sleep
description: A pure solo extreme heavily inspired by Eon clocking in at 20 minutes long. Many concepts from Eon are present here, and it takes advantage of its shorter length to experiment more with structures, designs and song representation without inflating its object count. Its gameplay is notable for 3 distinct fast-paced segments starting at 17.2%, 45.8% and 79%, separated by slower, easier gameplay.

name: We Are Not The Same (2P)
description: 2-player duo collab where player 2's part is extreme and player 1's is significantly easier to the point of non-demon gameplay, hence the name. Consists of themeless and pretty low-key visuals, including a review about the mario movie at end. I don't think we're alike at all Mr. White...

name: Cat Planet
description: A joke cat themed remake of both Aquamarine and Planet Circles. Features a long and easy predrop followed by an extremely hard wave. Has an SC66P inspired part and the PG Clubstep cat.

name: Niflheim
description: An old 2.0 pseudo-memory level featuring unique designs and moving objects, very hard ball timings, and lots of text portals. LDM ball cube ball big cube ball next...

name: Godspeed
description: A fast paced megacollab co-hosted by MrFreckles and Rynoxious that has been in development since 2021!

name: Rift
description: 1.6 Extreme demon megacollab made by AREDL List Moderator HazelSZL! It features vibrant colours, several tricky ship sections and a difficult predrop. The gameplay still manages to feel modern and polished despite its limitations. Generally considered to be the most well received 1.6 extreme.

name: KINGSLAYER
description: We are experiencing technical difficulties displaying this level's video, due to Sony Music Entertainment blocking it. Please replace or mute the song in your record if you plan on beating this level, as we can't look at your record if we can't see the video.

name: Maybe Possibly Thing
description: Memory level known for being goofy and having a funny bossfight. Is skewed towards mainly ship gameplay.

name: Manic Machine
description: Generally well-received timing and memory-based extreme demon with a green and red corrupted technological decoration that was made in 2.1. It was inspired by the 1.9 insane demon Chaotic Machine and is similar to Killbot although it contains less flashes. Has a very difficult ending.

name: FURY TECH
description: FRANK

name: Momentary Affection
description: The sequel to Lost Love that will really test your ability to memorize a path and ability to learn duals.

name: Audio Extraction
description: Originally created in 2.0 and got a bugfix and decoration update in 2.1. It had one of the earliest uses of the dual wave gimmick where both waves share the same gravity.

name: Huellas En La Nieve
description: A peaceful but extremely hard to learn memory level. Features a part where you must break every block in order to progress which does not work in practice mode. Also features a terrifying vertical memory wave at the end.

name: Redemption Arc
description: Wulzy’s first created extreme taking a twenty-seven video long playlist and 678 days from start to finish. Features several parts with different effects and skillsets. Overall very well received.

name: No Ember
description: A collage style fast paced level that switches style with each part. The difficulty is ending carried, and the level features many bursts of high cps gameplay.

name: Warios Gold MinE
description: Themed off of the Mario Kart Wii track by the same name, this gold mine themed level has many references to its source material, and is also generally very well received.

name: Glide
description: A unique extreme demon featuring many double-clicks. The gameplay is learny and somewhat inconsistent but satisfying, reflected by its mixed reception. Most of the difficulty is condensed into the cubes at the beginning and 71%, which include fixed hitboxes.

name: SLAY MOMENT
description: ItsMeGeoGD's latest modern extreme! Features sync gameplay and some very fabulous wave gaps.

name: Heartbeat (KrmaL)
description: An iconic 2.0 extreme featuring blood-red theming and unconventional gameplay, with infamous sections such as the 47% wave spam and the ending cube.

name: Weald
description: Peaceful woodland themed solo extreme featuring slow paced gameplay and an asymmetrical dual.

name: me when machine gang (2P)
description: A 2-player memory level by akunakun that was made in one sitting, with mostly path-based memory other than the splitscreen dual.

name: Avalanche (Filqh)
description: BLBL inspired extreme demon originally made 4 years ago, now fully updated and reverified by DaMeister.

name: Sides Of My Mind (2P)
description: A 2-player level that splits apart and then recombines together in the end. Visuals contain a lot of contrasting effects and feature rainbow and monochrome palette.

name: Out of Chaos
description: An extreme that's alike to Nhelv, even down to the song. The theming is of a struggle with mental health which is represented through its well-created, surreal effects in the decoration and its predominently black, white and red coloring which becomes very colorful nearing the end. Also features well-received, unorthodox gameplay with several dual sections, especially 83% - 86% due to the horizontally uneven ship gameplay.

name: Wacky McWhackface v2
description: Buffed Acu remake featuring a very similar click pattern and glow deco. Has an AI generated name.

name: Ergonomic Chair
description: A chair designed for efficiency and comfort. (Purple and yellow extreme mainly featuring ship and wave gameplay, but also features a swing dual and a multi-creator triple trial at the end.)

name: Destinies
description: A very long solo art level inspired by many other XL art levels such as Emerald Realm and Well Rested. The gameplay gets progressively faster paced and intense towards the end, and it features a lot of spider/spider orb gameplay. One of the most enjoyed extremes.

name: HyperHyperHyperHyper
description: Twan's first solo!!!

name: Tenkai (2P)
description: Hideki's two player level finally rated year's after it's release

name: Welcome To GD News
description: An easy extreme demon megacollab hosted by Vortrox to celebrate the success of his “GD news” video series on Youtube. It contains unique well-rounded flow gameplay.

name: 1330X
description: A fast-paced extreme collab filled with brutal gameplay complemented with glow-style decoration. Notoriously has a very chokable last wave and ship.

name: Hopping Over Puddles
description: Ruins themed level with calm deco and gameplay, mainly based in slow timings of cube and robot, it has surprisingly hard parts for its placement due to the duration of the level.

name: Pumped Up Kicks
description: An early 2.1 XXL megacollab hosted by Quiken, infamous for having unbalanced gameplay and the 47% orange orb timing.

name: ONVIL FACTORY
description: A solo extreme by Cordeaux dedicated to fellow creator Onvil for their birthday!

name: Recrystallize
description: A four minute long 1.9GDPS megacollab featuring parts made by GrenadeofTacos' family members. Has mostly fast paced, learny and well rounded gameplay. Also has a Toyota

name: Sleepwalking
description: Waterbound's second extreme demon, this time created in a minimal but atmospheric design in 24 hours. Uses only the cube gamemode once again.

name: A2Marbl
description: An easier but similarly fast paced clicksync sequel to ATMarbl. Features a hard last spider and Temp's insane wave part.

name: 4Elements
description: A faithful remake of Eiken's famous 1.9 insane demon The Four Elements. Took over a year to create, and each part features detailed and well themed decoration using 1.9 limitations. The gameplay is similar to the original but much harder.

name: Yeo Baek
description: Modern solo extreme with a long and complex asymmetrical dual in the second half.

name: Hades
description: BOIII WHAT U SAY ABOUT PHONK??

name: Zen Blast
description: Imagine a place where people of all walks of life can come together and bro down

name: I NEVER DREAM
description: Level with a very unique and (ironically) dreamy style, sharing its name with the used song by Against All Logic. Features gameplay mainly focused on cube timings and ship.

name: loop
description: A slow-paced, progression-oriented solo memory extreme, with the gameplay being based on the same repeating structure cycling through the different orb types with each iteration and the path forward being almost invisible, taking many unexpected twists and turns. The visuals and structuring get more complex as the level progresses, though it stays simple with its limited use of gamemodes and being entirely slow-speed.

name: Canneles Au Chocolat
description: A modern mashup style level with 2.2 camera effects featuring a French dessert. The gameplay is mainly made up of click sync based timings with notably hard wave chokepoints.

name: nowdead
description: A 1.9 GDPS solo extreme heavily comprised of learny sync gameplay and some quite difficult wave timings. There is a notable skip that can be performed at 76%. Also known for being one of the hardest levels to place on the IDL when it was a misrated insane demon, though it never made it to the top 1 spot due to Time Pulse also being insane demon at the time.

name: RTX ON
description: Pretty level which is extremely front loaded, with the predrop carrying a good portion of the difficulty. Focuses on timings.

name: Fair Morning
description: Graphic design style collab and sequel to Unfair Evening. Notable for being extremely short at only 35 seconds long, and features a tough randomised angled wave spam at the end.

name: Fexty
description: Overall plays like an insane demon, except for the awkward ship, and the iconic, extremely hard wave around 50%. Has a ton of bugs because its an ozpectro level.

name: SUBVERSIVE
description: The first Russian extreme demon megacollab. It doesn't have a consistent theme in either gameplay or decoration, aside from the general 2.0 aesthetic.

name: Marlboro reds
description: Highly skill based extreme with fast paced flow gameplay with an emphasis on wave. Smoking kills.

name: Gentlemens Clique (2P)
description: A 2-player level, a part of the gang trilogy. The level's name is meant to be a British version of Based Gang. Has a key you can collect to turn the bossfight icons into the Bass Cave demon.

name: The Ultimate Phase
description: A 1.9 megacollab hosted by Andromeda, containing many different iconic creators like Cyclic and ViPriN. Originally hack-verified, it would be one of the few extreme demons created and verified in 1.9. Generally poorly received due to the inconsistent duals, awkward spam and poor balancing.

name: In Circles
description: Nine Circles level which is inspired by Falling up and Black Blizzard. Legend has it, a mod played this level for 6% in practice mode, watched the showcase and didn’t send it because of the gameplay.

name: squelch
description: markus

name: Haircut
description: Collab hosted by Metalface221. Very unique sync-based level with bright effect decoration and one of the longest straight-flies of any rated extreme demon.

name: Spacious Senses
description: Memory extreme with QuazeryIceCube's signature freeform gameplay with many possible routes, and simple but effective decoration. The first half contains most of the difficulty, and a handful of timing chokepoints.

name: Gaming 35
description: A Zoink Doink collab that was in the works for more than 3 years, featuring extremely learny clicksync gameplay, with the first half being especially difficult.

name: KUB
description: A minimalistic style level that is reflected both in the deco and the fact the level only uses the cube gamemode. Features a long intro cutscene and some punishing custom hitboxes.

name: headlock
description: Solo-intended 2p level created and verified by Pocke. Uses a lot of gimmicks where the second player input does things like changing the player's size or the colour of an orb. Generally a good start for getting into solo 2p.

name: BYE
description: A remake of Hi by KrmaL. The level was poorly received, and the creator asked for it to be deleted off the servers but was denied by moderators. As it's a buffed version of the original, the gameplay is gimmicky, chokepoint heavy, and has a very hard second half.

name: MAKE ME SAD
description: Solo extreme with light gradient decoration reminiscent of Rust. Has mainly timing based gameplay, and a ship at the end with a lot of orbs.

name: Broken Signal
description: High quality level themed around a computer breaking down. Features mainly sync based gameplay, some hard waves, and a mirrored section at the end.

name: Volume
description: Easy extreme demon most notable for the extremely hard wave in the mid points. The rest of the level is considerably easier except for a few hard ship gaps.

name: On1y Cub3
description: Solo level by DrCuber. As the name implies, this level is purely cube gameplay with various timing gimmicks. Has a notoriously hard first part, and two parts with an orb that follows the player.

name: PARANOIA (AAAAAlex)
description: Originally an unfinished level named Tazz by Shocksidian, finished up and published by AAAAAlex

name: Tech Manifestation
description: Has an overall horrible reputation, due to the beginning, and the infamous last third, having the 90% click of all time.

name: Our Fountain
description: A slow and very atmospheric XL extreme using an equally atmospheric song to match. Features detailed block designs and some memory sections. Gets generally harder as the level progresses, ending with a short, slow, but very narrow nine circles style wave.

name: STARBREAKER
description: The prequel to STARCRASH with gameplay made by SoggyCat and decorated by ClingingBog. Set in an abandoned city, where a star creation experiment is left unmaintained. The player must reach the top of the factory to stop this experiment, or the star will collapse. Notable for its high-CPS clicksync dual gameplay throughout the drop.

name: Retention
description: One of the first dual heavy extreme demons to exist. Overall pretty fun and very learny, especially the cube at 65%.

name: M A N I X
description: A level built by Manix648 for KrmaL in response to an offhand joke made by RobTop, featuring completely invisible gameplay. In comparison to the visible version that came later, some aspects of the gameplay are much more difficult and unpredictable.

name: Last Station
description: A long and dark clicksync-based level, themed after trains in both it's deco and song. The gameplay is learny and heavy on timings, with some hard cube and ship gameplay.

name: SHURIMA
description: A solo extreme that took 1 year to make. Has distinct parts in its art decoration and its timing-based gameplay leading up to the player's ascension at the end.

name: Red World Rebirth
description: Harder version of Red World, with most its difficulty being ship and swing copter gameplay.

name: YIPPEE
description: Enfur's first 2.2 level which uses a rainbow theme and is much more accessible than their other levels. YIPPEE!!!

name: 3ABNCNMOCT6
description: Russian for 'Addiction,' this level features unusual cube only gameplay and extremely bright and unsettling story-based decoration.

name: Cybersonic
description: A tribute to all sonic series levels hosted by MinAY! The gameplay, decoration, and song choice are all inspired by the old sonic series levels, with a particular emphasis on HyperSonic's early 2.1 style.

name: Northern Essence
description: 1.9 Christmas-themed megacollab hosted by Youknowwho.

name: Zettabyte
description: Jenkins level with very unique decoration at the time, and very unique yet awkward gameplay.

name: Stasis
description: Arraegen's entry in the Zeronium CC2 Creator Contest! Uses player colors for the colors of the decoration.

name: doradura
description: Cute love-themed level with amazing decoration and click-sync, flow based gameplay. Some transitions can be an issue for some.

name: Deception Dive
description: Deceptively simple beginning until the difficulty spikes in the second half. Nerve wracking as a result.

name: Crowd Control
description: Iconic for its challenging wave in the beginning, and very precise ship.

name: Air Tech
description: A remake of Sky Tech, containing updated decoration that is also quite colorful. This remake retains a similar gameplay style, though it buffs the wave segments of Sky Tech by quite a bit.

name: Elite Z Rebirth
description: Remake of the old impossible level Elite Z. Primarily known for the infamous two-player straight fly and the "So Pro?" UFO spam.

name: CYCLONE
description: Short level that's fairly chokepoints heavy, most notably Jenkins' extremely fast part.

name: Soundwave
description: A level inspired by volume and made as an attribute to Metalface. Boost a couple similarities to Volume, most notably having a pretty difficult wave section in the middle of the level.

name: FanTasticLand
description: Strange, poorly received modern extreme from 2020 that has been described as a superbuffed 4 star.

name: Polish Alphabet
description: A remake of Alphabet X by a group of Polish creators. Known for a double blue orb timing that appears in the level multiple times.

name: TROLLMACHINE
description: Red glow layout style clicksync level, based on phonk memes and as such featuring a lot of trollfaces. Very tightly synced, and known for it's hard duals.

name: STRATUS
description: The first Legendary rated extreme demon. An energetic, high quality megacollab with a signature green style. Gameplay is fast paced and engaging, and so learny at times that it borders on memory.

name: night party
description: A 28 person megacollab made as the last level ever made by Rlol. The decoration is colorful and reminiscent of party lights. The gameplay and song reflect this, being fast-paced and energetic.

name: UNG
description: The hardest level in the An Gyung trilogy. It is mostly fast-paced with a slower predrop. The beginning is considered the hardest part, containing many awkward chokepoints.

name: Obscura
description: Cavern themed art megacollab featuring timing based gameplay in the first half of the level and fast paced click sync based gameplay in the second half. Used to be harder than Eternal Moment, but received a major nerfdate when it fell out of the top 150.

name: The Flawless
description: Very old hell level with precise timings and some fast ship parts.

name: UltraSans
description: Surprisingly high quality joke remake of Ultrasonic, featuring an extension with multiple other sonic series inspired parts. Every part in the level is made by Sans Undertale.

name: CICADA3302
description: An effect layout masterpiece spanning over 7 minutes long. The gameplay is mostly comprised of learny clicksync, which intensifies as the level progresses. The level is themed around an unsolved internet ARG, Cicada 3301, with many easter eggs and QR codes scattered throughout the level referencing the puzzles. Received a bugfix update which made it become one of the most enjoyed extremes the game.

name: Allegiance
description: Colorful dark level and the second level of the Dedication Series, with most of its difficulty in the middle parts. Can be a drag to play from 0.

name: The Gins II
description: A first-half heavy sequel that's based off of a comedy-horror film of the same name. Features a variety of different fast-paced gameplay types, including a bossfight at 70%.

name: Vertigo (PAHC)
description: Most notable for its random offset gimmick, where the gameplay is offset from the visible decoration. Most of the difficulty comes from the gimmick, making this one of the most unique easy extremes.

name: Jail Break
description: Solo extreme with over 200 hours of editor work where you break out of prison and traverse through forests and cityscapes as you attempt to escape the police. Its gameplay is full of gamemode switches and has a few camera gimmicks, and the deco has many easter eggs.

name: Existentia
description: "sorry for gameplay lol"

name: HyperSonic
description: Well known megacollab.  Consists of overall awkward gameplay, but can also be pretty fun.

name: Just DANCE
description: Was formerly way harder and poorly received, after the update its just poorly received now.

name: Light Travel
description: A nine minute long extreme with simple but very effective yellow decoration and great song representation. Contains mostly slow paced and easy gameplay, but has some difficult dual parts, a hard last wave, and lots of fixed hitboxes. A true test of endurance and nerve control.

name: LOOSE ENDS
description: The second half is a bit harder than the first

name: V O L L E Y
My Own Funeral
description: A red effect solo extreme with an unsettling atmosphere. Contains a short memory section in the second half.

name: Twilight Spire
description: An older Loltad layout decorated in 2.2 by Loltad and IceRod. Features complex memory gameplay and uses the second half of Theory of Everything 2. Perhaps most notable for receiving an incredible twelve 100s in a row on EDEL. One of the most enjoyed extremes.

name: Matilda the Machine
description: Very raw Jeyzor level with extremely hard duals and a funny bossfight at the end.

name: Doop
description: XL level featuring a variety of skillsets, but has a major difficulty spike in the final wave and ship.

name: Virtual Collapse
description: A beginner extreme with fast-paced flowy and learny gameplay by TeamUprising that uses a mix of all gamemodes. The difficulty of the gameplay increases near the end. Its glow-style decoration is prominently pink, purple and blue in its coloring and has a technological theming. Has a high object count of 256k.

name: Thunder Alphabet
description: Very similar to polish alphabet, but more fun and learny duals.

name: Castling
description: A fast paced level with multiple chokepoints, most notably the 4% jump and the 74% wave gap. Was somehow formerly rated Insane Demon.

name: EdenCity
description: An electric and futuristic city-themed collaboration with distinct parts, bright colors and a mixture of detailed designs and effects. The gameplay is regarded as being rather learny thanks to the complex dual gameplay. There are also chokepoints throughout, notably the dual ship at the 60% mark.

name: The Ultimate Demon
description: A “demon mix” type of level with around 40 seconds of gameplay with a lot of popular extremes, such as Acheron, Firework and Bloodbath with clean but simple decoration made in 2.1 by the content creator Vit12. The level contains several chokepoints and is first-half carried. It’s also the prequel to The Ultimate Return.

name: Final Round
description: Short extreme primarily inspired by Deadlocked

name: Uprise
description: 2.0 level which has chokepoints and bugs scattered through out, the most iconic of which is the extremely hard wave with a random UFO break in the middle of it.

name: Realtered
description: A predominantly skill-based beginner extreme which was worked on for 8 months. Features colourful design decoration and a very upbeat song by Waterflame. Has all-around gameplay with the hardest part generally being considered the dual section from 58% to 70%.

name: Clarity
description: An upbeat solo extreme taking inspiration from numerous design creators and featuring the popular pop song of the same name. Has some learny and unusual but well synced gameplay and a very complex dual at the end.

name: four
description: Short and fairly learny level that was placed at #3 on IDL when it got rated. Features a fast paced rainbow first half and a monochrome ending with some tricky timings.

name: Cosmorush 21
description: A very old 2.0 level with poorly aged decoration but better gameplay. Has a complex asymmetrical dual in the first half. One of the oldest sync focused extremes.

name: Make It Drop
description: Very purple and green, and the gameplay consists of fast paced click sync, which can be pretty fun. Somehow its XL even though it doesnt feel that long.

name: FinKor
description: A very large megacollab featuring many Finnish and Korean creators. The decoration and gameplay vary a lot throughout the three minute runtime, but much of the difficulty is condensed into a few chokepoints.

name: Dark Odyssey
description: A solo level originally made for the GDS Creator Contest, though it missed the submission deadline. As a remake of and sequel to Dark Travel, it has a similar structure while significantly improving on decoration in each section.

name: Place
description: A massive community project started by Spu7Nix, inspired by r/place. Built by over 14,000 players, this is one of the largest Geometry Dash collabs to ever be made, with countless ways to get through the level.

name: Reverie
description: The first part of the Ocular Miracle Trilogy, featuring stunning decoration for the time and fast paced gameplay. Has some janky sections in the mid parts and most notably entirely lacks a drop. A former misrated insane demon until 2024, it reigned as a formidable IDL top 5, including time at top 1, for many years before being finally promoted.

name: 8o X
description: A harder remake of 8o, keeping the same formatting as the original level. The decoration features more glow and effects, while keeping the same simplistic block design.

name: Ion
description: A 1.6 styled level started in early 2.1 and finished in 2.2. Known for being one of the best ship based beginner extremes. Has an asymmetrical dual in the middle and a hard electrodynamix style ending ship.

name: WHITE LIGHT
description: Solo extreme by Kreno set to the Gorillaz song of the same name. Has a fully greyscale colour scheme and skill based gameplay.

name: Grand Eclipse
description: A high quality megacollab by the BloomOcean team themed around the solar eclipse and the mythology surrounding it.

name: Forbidden Isle
description: Sillow extreme demon which, like their others, consists of mostly skill based gameplay, mostly wave and ship.

name: Aimbotter Force
description: An XL Hexagon Force remake using the second half of the song. Features a long asymmetrical dual in the second half with lots of swingcopter gameplay using unusual gamemodes.

name: The Lost Existence
description: A 5 minute XL level created for the #levelution movement during 2.1. The gameplay is mostly comprised of timings and clicksync with a sharp difficulty spike in the middle of the level.

name: geography dash
description: A four and a half minute long level, going through the countries of the world. Made and verified solo, on an ipad

name: Liz
description: A skill based flow level with an outdoor theme featuring many asymmetrical duals and hard waves. Features some challenging wave chokepoints in the first half, difficult duals throughout, and ends with a challenging click consistency dual wave. Also features an Undertale remix, meaning you may have a bad time...

name: Hollow
description: A unique minimalistic memory level using simple but effective block structures on a dark background. The gameplay is very freeform, and the large maze at the end has an immeasurable number of possible routes.

name: verisimilitude
description: A very quirky timings focused level with many gimmicks. Has many fake spikes in the beginning spider and the brutal ending ball. Only has two ships, with one being very orb focused, and the other skill focused. Is very second half heavy with the second ship and the ball carrying most of the difficulty.

name: phantasmagoria (whlt)
description: whlt's first solo extreme. It's on the shorter side and has pastel-colored effect decoration. The gameplay syncs well with the song and consists of 4 parts, with the gimmick of each part being increasingly difficult as the level goes on.

name: Cataclysm
description: One of the most well known extreme demons. The first level in the Apocalyptic trilogy. Consists of a lot of difficult ship parts and an extremely hard beginning wave.

name: my worst level
description: May or may not be MrPoopyBurger's worst level...

name: Melancholy
description: Dark and emotional XXL+ solo level with minimalistic but effective decoration. Nearly entirely greyscale, but gains a small but meaningful amount of colour at the second drop. The gameplay is heavily endurance based, and has multiple split paths and frequent timings. Took 4 years to get featured.

name: POINTIERCRATE
description: A solo extreme using only spikes for decoration! Features unusual gameplay, including a diagonal asymmetrical ship.

name: A Fleeting Reverie
description: Exscher's first serious attempt at getting a rated level. An insanely detailed art level with some small two player segments.

name: Twitch Denan
description: An extreme with a theming around the streaming platform which is featured in its pre-drop and ending; it otherwise features purple-colored glow decoration. Contains flowy and learny gameplay with the wave parts being most prevalent in difficulty.

name: Komodo
description: An extreme that was formerly #1 on the Insane Demon list. Originally made in 2.0, though was reworked in 2.1. Features a mostly red and orange color scheme with its simpler decoration style. The gameplay is all-around with its gamemodes, though the wave parts can prove quite a challenge.

name: goober land
description: Beginner extreme megacollab featuring multiple steamhappy cameos and a very silly tone overall.

name: GLISTEN
description: Short timing level focused on clicking exactly to the songs beat, Typically well received due to being very satisfying.

name: eclipse
description: Very bright and intense space rainbow level in Vit12's signature style. Also contains Vit's signature simple, skillbased gameplay style which can be divisive, though this time with better transitions and playtesting.

name: FEEL ALIVE
description: A passion project megacollab hosted by Loc9e over 6 years in the making! Features Woogi inspired decoration with tasteful usage of glow, and a Porter Robinson song mashup. The gameplay is very well received and features learny/memory sections and a handful of duals. The 85% pink orb is not as hard as it used to be.

name: Shimmering Chamber
description: Extreme demon with a consistent glow decoration style that shifts colors throughout. Has timings-based gameplay with there being a difficulty spike at the ending.

name: Azurite (Sillow)
description: A skill-based Extreme Demon comprised of heavy wave and ship gameplay, as well as some fake orbs and somewhat difficult timings. Notably a very popular beginner Extreme, due to the gameplay being relatively straightforward and easy to learn.

name: Paralysis
description: Unorthodox extreme with a slow pre-drop which heightens in both pace and difficulty at the drop with the waves being the hardest parts. The effects are very flashy and aim to obscure the player's vision.

name: Flappy Dynamix II
description: A short and intense UFO-only extreme. Has distinct segments with differing styles of effect decoration. Contains very unorthodox and learny gameplay, including 2P and a boss fight section.

name: Final Epilogue
description: The last extreme demon from 2.0. Each section is styled after one of Pennutoh's other levels, and as such they vary a lot. Its gameplay is learny and fast-paced, and has all-round balancing.

name: The Depths Above
description: A solo extreme themed around the game Outer Wilds. The gameplay is gimmicky with some hard timings and varying gravity, and there's a minigame section based on the game before the drop.

name: Crimson Citadel
description: A remake to ZenthicAlpha's hard demon, Crimson Chamber. Heavily revamps the gameplay with 2.2 mechanics, and updates the decoration while staying true to the original. The gameplay balancing is all-around with some difficult dual sections.

name: mischievousmechanism
description: A design deco factory-themed extreme demon, with many different unique gimmicks throughout. The difficulty is heavily carried by the wave section at 66%, and it's overall very learny.

name: CITYFADE
description: A city themed level with unusual dreamy landscapes and whimsical nature. Very chill but nerve racking gameplay with a vertical part and a fully randomised part in the middle of the level. Enjoy the walk before those beautiful cities get destroyed in the disaster!

name: Artificial Climb
description: A red and gray-colored beginner megacollab extreme that captures the style of old 2.0 levels with both its decoration being influenced by Artificial Ideology, and its unconventional gameplay style. The gameplay itself is all-around, though the wave parts are slightly more difficult.

name: Decay
description: A well-received slow-paced extreme demon with vibrant colors with eye-catching, glitchy effects, and a route around the start that changes the colour scheme. The gameplay is precision-based timings built with no spikes, which can take getting used to but do get consistent.

name: TANTRUM
description: A megacollab hosted by DanZmeN and verified by Golden, featuring tricky, fast-paced timings, difficult wave sections and overall janky gameplay. Has an infamous mini-wave at the end of the level.

name: Fun Friday
description: A Zeronium solo level themed around FUN FRIDAY! Where many fun things can happen, on a Friday. Contains multiple references to fun and silly things from Zeronium's streams.

name: Wavetrip
description: Four minute wave only extreme that gets faster and more intense as the level progresses

name: Sephtis
description: An extreme similar to Reverence, with flowy gameplay and red and blue effecty glow decoration. The gameplay is learny and carried by the wave segments, with several bugs and chokepoints throughout the level.

name: Mystic Bounds
description: Extremely long and enjoyable level with pixel decoration and an intense song. Features mostly clicksync based gameplay, and has a hard dual in the second half.
Medium length megacollab that is surprisingly 1.9 themed. Has an ancient level ID that was updated.

name: Mizureta
description: A reta-styled extreme which takes much aspects in decoration and gameplay from the levels it is styled upon. The gameplay is typical of a level of its style: highly flowy and features a lot of clicksync. A lot of the difficulty is condensed into the middle sections. Took a couple of years for it to get rated.

name: Misty Mountains
description: Well known atmospheric XL level with generally slow low cps timing based gameplay and a dual at the end. Has a long cutscene at the start.

name: Freedom16
description: Freedom08 remake built entirely in the 1.6 editor. Showcases a variety of deco and gameplay styles throughout its 4 minute length, however sacrifices some of its intensity as the entire level is in 1x speed.

name: niwa
description: Very well known easy reta style extreme with the typical fast paced flow gameplay, purple glow decoration, and Yoasobi song. One of the most popular beginner extremes.

name: Without U
description: Extremely high-quality extreme demon that is very well-received. Contains intense and overall complex gameplay which makes it learny, especially the dual segments. Also features a gimmick nearing the end where eight heart shards must be collected in order to complete the level.

name: JeonGi
description: Electricity themed solo with simple design and effects, and a mixture of clicksync and timing based gameplay. Despite receiving a large nerf, it is highly unbalanced. Most of the difficulty comes from the middle sections and the very hard wave near the end. (verification video was privated/deleted)

name: Duplication
description: A fast-paced, learny megacollab. The level is praised for its decoration, having detailed designs and effects, enhanced by the extremely vivid rainbow color scheme.

name: Fallen Horizon
description: An extreme demon focused on ship, timings and swingcopter gameplay that is highly received, with a satisfying flow. The art decoration has a theming of a submerged and overgrown city that the player falls into after the first third.

name: Raindance
description: 2019 design-style extreme demon megacollab that lacks a coherent theme. The gameplay is all-around and fast-paced. The ending segment can be a significant chokepoint, as the wave and ship in it are more challenging than the previous segments.

name: Prismatic
description: Long and cute rainbow coloured extreme with an equally playful song. Mostly timing based, especially in the spider sections, but also features a hard dual and a challenge-like first wave. Has multiple double clicks.

name: Devils Disco
description: A very well-received extreme demon. The fast-paced, all-around gameplay of the level is highly learny and requires high CPS. The decoration is colorful, and it focuses on vibrant designs and effects which add to the intensity of the level.

name: ReVolution Unleashed
description: An extreme demon which has a very well-regarded theming of a desolate and decaying urban world captured through its purely greyscale coloring, design and art decoration style and the very fitting song-choice. The gameplay has been criticised for feeling tedious.

name: Erosion
description: Sequel to the insane demon Corrosion. The decoration is of a similar style to its predecessor, altered to reflect the heightened intensity of the song. Builds off of Corrosion's gameplay through an increase in difficult timings, a faster pace and higher complexity through the use of 2.2 mechanics.

name: 4 Matilda
description: The final level in the For Matilda series. Features a mixture of design and art decoration which makes every segment distinct. The gameplay is timings-based and has an unconventional style. The final part of the level is a precise minigame section where multiple cubes have differing zooms and angles.

name: Color Beam
description: Bizaare's ode to the simpler side of Geometry Dash. An xl memory level using deliberately simple designs and subtle effects, and prioritising song representation above all else.

name: lezicuv
description: 2.0 level based on the infamous hack verified ozpectro levels, it has been subject to a multitude of buffs over the years, and is now known for awkward gameplay and two absurd predrop triple spikes.

name: Me Lin A
description: A sequel to insane demon Lin Anya. Features mostly all-around learny gameplay, though the ship is more prominent than the other gamemodes. The level mixes design, art and effect decoration with its vibrant and colorful glow style.

name: BRAINWASH
description: A well-received medium-length extreme which contains a mixture of memory gameplay and timings throughout. The decoration emphasises design and is prominently blue with its coloring. Features a very memorable transition at the 71% mark.

name: Shotgun
description: An extreme demon by the large creation team SpinStudios, which gives it a very varying glow decoration style emphasising effects and design with a mostly red and orange color scheme. Contains flowy and fast paced gameplay with difficult wave sections.

name: memories III
description: Poorly received Dorami verification, due to the duals containing a major chunk of the difficulty, although the rest of the level is pretty fun.

name: Pentakill
description: An extreme demon collaboration between Xaro and WOOGI1411 from all the way back in 2.0 that took several years to get rated. Contains colorful decoration that is standard of the time. The gameplay is all-around and learny, with several chokepoints.

name: Cold Level Go BRRRR
description: An extreme demon with a light-hearted frosty theming, having vibrant and varied shades of blue as well as a mixture of effect and design decoration. The gameplay is fast-paced and features all-around learny gameplay.

name: Bang Gang (2P)
description: The first 2-player extreme in Geometry Dash. Was verified by four different people swapping positions mid-completion. The decoration is in DanZmeN's typicial 2019 style. Features learny segments and a bossfight with arrows that are not entirely accurate.

name: Based Gang (2P)
description: A 2-player level that takes inspiration from Bang Gang. In order to make it more feasible to do solo, as the final 20% can be nerfed in exchange for not getting the coin.

name: Voluto
description: A beginner extreme demon worked on for several years with its decoration focusing on a colorful glow design style with a mixture of some effects. The flowy gameplay has a mixture of pacing with the first 33% generally being considered the hardest section.

name: Supernova
description: A beginner 1.9PS extreme demon megacollab. Manages to capture the essence of old megacollabs such as Supersonic with its varied decoration styles. Has an all-around fast-paced gameplay style with difficult wave and ship sections.

name: Cerebral Torment
description: A solo extreme demon that has very bizarre, unconventional yet intriguing art decoration attached with a heavy amount of variety. The gameplay matches this decoration style by being heavily unorthodox.

name: troll level
description: One of the more popular beginner extremes. Very light-hearted and unconventional in its structuring and colorful decoration style. The gameplay mixes memory gameplay with some precise timings. It also gives the player the freedom of having multiple paths to choose from, especially after the pre-drop.

name: The Winged Sword
description: A 1.9-style solo extreme with various styles of decoration throughout. Has generally skill-based ship and timings gameplay, with a difficult dual part at the drop.

name: tran la luot
description: A solo extreme that's the sequel to the medium demon 'nguyen bang qua'. Very experimental with its decoration with intense flashes and colors. The timing-heavy gameplay starts off with a slower-pace which quickens in its learny second-half.

name: Jumping Demons
description: A solo extreme by smarted, themed as a lost pilot animation made in the analog VHS era, inspired by the Jumping Devils song animation. The deco has a lot of custom lineart and effects. The gameplay consists of sync-based duals, and changes direction a lot throughout the level.

name: Horros (2P)
description: A 2-player level that has no consistent theme, as there is "no sense of continuity in dreams". For 2-player play it is borderline extreme demon gameplay, and has been rated as insane demon in the past.

name: the super hotdog
description: A short and extremely silly rainbow level inspired by The Wiener. Features a hard first cube, clicksync gameplay, heavy shader and camera trigger usage, an incomprehensible spam dual, and of course the super hotdog itself. Do not take aredl placements as fact...

name: ANNIHILATED
description: The sequel to the insane demon DESTROYED which expands on its dual gameplay with a longer level length and has an overall higher CPS. Its high-quality design decoration features a very similar theme to its predecessor where you flee a burning facility that's being destroyed.

name: SIGSEGV
description: An extended remake of the 30 second long "Segmentation Fault." A highly unique extreme using only the cube gamemode but in unusual and gimmicky ways. This includes a maximum click section and many parts where an orb is taped to your cube. The strange gameplay is accompanied by appropriately unusual effects.

name: Sweater Weather
description: A solo remake of the unrated hard demon "Unfound Emotions" with near-identical base gameplay. Its decoration style is similar, but it also introduces tasteful colour usage, especially in the drop to contrast it from the more grayscale predrop and ending. Despite its difficulty often being debated over extreme or insane demon, its ship parts are especially challenging for its difficulty.

name: squeak
description: squeak

name: Acu
description: The most popular first extreme, for a good reason. Overall extremely well received for its accessible and fun gameplay throughout. Notably very 60hz friendly, and most of the difficulty is near the start and end.

name: Monitor
description: A 3 minute long pure solo extreme using a pixelation effect where each pixel is visibly split into its RGB subpixels, much like how actual monitor screens work. Its base gameplay is relatively simple for its difficulty though it gets more complex in the second half with asymmetrical duals.

name: Through The Decay
description: A slow and peaceful minimalistic level themed around a set of ruins that was impressively built in only 2 hours. Features precision timing gameplay throughout, with lots of corner block jumps.

name: Precipitance
description: A popular beginner solo extreme with colorful glow decoration throughout and a very repetitive song. Features fast-paced, clicksync gameplay with a mixture of gamemodes. Watch out for skipping any orbs, as the level gets angry at you if you do.

name: Red World
description: The oldest rated extreme demon. Used to be impossible due to an update turning a solid block into a decoration piece, until that was fixed, and the level was rated. Consists of one of the first instances of the swing copter, and some extremely hard ship parts.
